title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains agent harness engineering as an evolution in agentic AI systems, covering the progression from prompt engineering and context engineering through loops and architecture. The video positions harness engineering as a growing clarification on how agentic systems are designed and controlled.
